---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Let's connect"
---

## Get in Touch

I'm always open to connecting with professionals, recruiters, and fellow students in the **data analytics, machine learning, and business transformation** space. Whether you'd like to discuss a project, explore a collaboration, or just chat about analytics, feel free to reach out.

::: {.callout-note}
## Based in
Dublin / Waterford, Ireland — open to opportunities across Ireland, the UK, and remote roles globally.
:::

## Reach Me At

| Channel | Details |
|---------|---------|
| **Email** | [tcrohithkrishna1999@gmail.com](mailto:crohithkrishna1999@gmail.com) |
| **LinkedIn** | [linkedin.com/in/linkedin.com/in/rohith-krishna-b6a2b711b](https://linkedin.com/in/rohith-krishna-b6a2b711b) |
| **GitHub** | [github.com/rohithkrishna99](https://github.com/rohithkrishna99) |
| **Location** | Ireland |

## Professional References

Professional and academic references are **available upon request**. Please reach out via email for references from:

- My MSc programme supervisors at Dublin City University
- Former managers at IBS Software Ltd, Tata Technologies, and TCS
- Project collaborators and teammates

## What I'm Looking For

::: {.callout-tip}
## Open To
- **Graduate / Analyst roles** in AI-powered business transformation
- **Business Analyst** and **Product owner** positions
- **Consulting opportunities** in analytics and digital transformation
- **Internships** aligned with MSc Business Analytics
- postions that require Analytics and Machine learning expertise
:::

Thanks for visiting my portfolio. I look forward to hearing from you.
